name: AdminHelper
description: Adds direct staff moderation commands for ban, hackban, unban, kick, softban, timeout, untimeout, warn, warning lookup, warning clearing, and user info, with optional DM notices and mod-log embeds.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: AdminHelper loaded. Use `[p]adminhelper` to inspect settings. Moderation commands include `[p]ban`, `[p]kick`, `[p]timeout`, and `[p]softban`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level moderation settings and per-member warning records containing moderator IDs, reasons, and timestamps.
